message:
test(fuzz): add verify_cookie field-binding metamorphic fuzz target (resolves 674lv)

compute_cookie + verify_cookie (session.rs:989-1026) implement the
stateless DoS-prevention HMAC-SHA256 over canonical CBOR of seven hello
fields. Existing fuzz coverage tests decode_cookie_bytes (wire format)
and verify_session_mac binding — but not the cookie's per-field binding,
where a regression that drops any of (from, to, eph_pubkey, nonce,
timestamp, suites, transport_limits) from compute_cookie's HMAC input
would silently let an attacker pivot a captured cookie.

Five properties:
- round-trip verify(compute(key, hello)) → Ok
- determinism on (key, hello)
- per-field binding (×7): mutate one field, original cookie MUST trip
  InvalidCookie under verify
- key-binding: cookie computed under alt key MUST NOT verify under orig
- cookie-tamper rejection (bit-flip on cookie bytes) — anchors the
  ct_eq path at session.rs:1021

Once-gated regression anchors:
- timestamp-binding: t=1_000_000 cookie under t=2_000_000 hello MUST
  reject (defeats indefinite cookie replay)
- eph_pubkey-binding: cookie under one eph pubkey MUST NOT verify under
  a fresh swap-in (defeats mid-handshake ephemeral substitution)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -461,5 +461,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_session_cookie_binding"
+path = "fuzz_targets/session_cookie_binding.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
